query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT 
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'reservations' 
  AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('channel', 'customer_email')
ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute 
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT 
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'reservations' 
  AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('channel', 'customer_email')
ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_DEFAULT
channel	enum('web','crm','telefono','email','otro','tpv')	YES	web
customer_email	varchar(255)	YES	NULL
